creator: michiel@vanbaak.eu
text:
(In reply to jaskerx from comment #0)

There was a build error with the mono port, and since sonarr depends on it, it was skipped.
The error has been fixed, the next bulk build will result in sonarr being available again.

Status can be checked here: https://www.freshports.org/net-p2p/sonarr/
The /quarterly repo has sonarr, and it's only 1 version behind upstream. Can you use that in the mean time until the latest repo has sonarr again? (which will be the latest version)
